---
title: "Longitudinal development in physical performance in adolescent team sport athletes"
subtitle: "How does sex, age, and maturation influence physical development?"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

# Bakgrunn


**Vil du se mer eller diskutere prosjektet?**\
📧 [Send meg en e-post](mailto:larsmartin95@hotmail.com?subject=Henvendelse%20fra%20portef%C3%B8lje)

🔗 [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/lars-martin-tingelstad-657940113/)
